page_metadata.biotools__summary: A scientific database for the bacterium Escherichia coli K-12 MG1655. This project performs literature-based curation of the entire genome, and of transcriptional regulation, transporters, and metabolic pathways.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: A scientific database for the bacterium Escherichia coli K-12 MG1655. This project performs literature-based curation of the entire genome, and of transcriptional regulation, transporters, and metabolic pathways.
